offers.title: Offers
offers.subtitle: Create, manage, and monitor promotional campaigns for your tenant.
offers.confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this offer?
offers.wizard_subtitle: Configure offer details, eligibility, and limits.
offers.validation_start_date_not_past: Start date cannot be in the past.
offers.validation_end_date_after_start: End date must be same or later than start date.
offers.hint_usage_limit: Maximum number of times this offer can be used across all customers combined.
offers.hint_per_customer_limit: Maximum number of times a single customer can use this offer.
offers.hint_leave_empty_for_all: Leave empty to apply to all.
offers.hint_all_selected_by_default: All selected by default. Pick specific ones to restrict.
offers.hint_pack_scope: Pack Discount applies to the packs configured in Product Setup. No additional category or product scoping is needed.
offers.hint_b1g1_reward_single_product: Select one reward product. Free Quantity applies to this selected product.
offers.hint_delivery_min_cart_value: Minimum cart value required to unlock this free delivery offer.
offers.hint_delivery_max_charge: Free delivery discount is capped to this amount. Use 0 for full delivery fee.
offers.hint_delivery_methods: Choose delivery methods where this offer should apply.
offers.hint_delivery_specific_pin_codes: Offer applies only for selected pin codes.
offers.hint_delivery_repeat_limit: Maximum number of times this free delivery offer can be applied per order.
offers.hint_delivery_categories_optional: Optional: restrict free delivery to selected categories.
offers.hint_delivery_excluded_categories: Optional: exclude selected categories from free delivery eligibility.
offers.settings_subtitle: Control tenant-wide rules for offers and loyalty.
offers.hint_offer_program_enabled: Turn off to disable all offer calculations for this tenant.
offers.hint_auto_enable_b1g1: New B1G1 offers will be enabled automatically when eligible.
offers.hint_auto_enable_coupon: Coupon-based offers activate automatically after creation.
offers.hint_loyalty_program_enabled: Enable loyalty earning and redemption for all customers in this tenant.
offers.hint_enable_points_with_discount: When enabled, customers earn points on discounted orders too.
offers.hint_enable_coupon_with_loyalty: When enabled, coupon discounts and loyalty redemption can be used together.
offers.hint_points_per_amount: Define how many points are earned for a given spend amount.
offers.hint_redemption_value: Define how many points equal a currency discount amount.
offers.hint_point_validity: Number of days before earned points expire.
offers.hint_auto_enable_loyalty: Allow loyalty earn and redeem programs by default.
offers.hint_loyalty_expiry: Number of days before loyalty points expire.
offers.hint_loyalty_earn_multiplier: Multiplier applied when calculating earned points.
offers.hint_auto_order_discount_application_mod: Default is option 1: apply only the best single eligible tier. Change only if you want tier stacking.
offers.hint_stacking_mode: Choose how offers combine when multiple offers are eligible.
offers.hint_coupon_stacking: Permit multiple coupon offers in the same order.
offers.hint_include_b1g1_in_coupon_base: Do you want coupons on B1G1 products?
offers.hint_b1g1_stacking: Permit B1G1 offers to stack with other offers.
offers.setting_include_b1g1_in_auto_offer_base: Apply Auto Offers On B1G1 Products
offers.hint_include_b1g1_in_auto_offer_base: Do you want auto offers on B1G1 products?
offers.hint_max_coupons: Limit the number of coupon codes allowed in one order.
offers.step_program_activation_intro: Step 1: Turn offers ON for your store. Then choose which offers should run automatically.
offers.alert_b1g1_auto_enable_inactive: Heads up: You have {{count}} active B1G1 offer(s), but Auto Enable B1G1 is currently inactive. Storefront B1G1 badges and home section will not appear until it is enabled.
offers.note_enable_program_first: Turn on Enable Offer Program first. Other offer settings will start working after that.
offers.step_loyalty_intro: Step 2: Configure loyalty points only if you want points earning and redemption in your store.
offers.note_loyalty_hidden_until_program_enable: Loyalty settings will appear after enabling the Offer Program.
offers.step_checkout_intro: Step 3: Choose checkout behavior and storefront visibility for B1G1 offers.
offers.setting_show_b1g1_badge_on_cards: Show B1G1 badge on product cards
offers.hint_show_b1g1_badge_on_cards: Display a B1G1 tag on eligible products in listing and grid views.
offers.hint_show_b1g1_home_section: Render a dedicated B1G1 products carousel above categories on storefront home.
offers.setting_max_b1g1_home_items: Max products in B1G1 home section
offers.hint_max_b1g1_home_items: Leave empty to show all eligible items. Enter a value (1 or more) to set a custom limit.
offers.hint_delivery_stacking_policy: Choose how free-delivery offers stack with auto and coupon discounts.
offers.option_delivery_stack_with_all: Stack with both Auto and Coupon offers
offers.option_delivery_non_stackable: Do not stack with other offers
offers.note_checkout_hidden_until_program_enabl: Checkout and storefront rules will appear after enabling the Offer Program.
offers.error_max_coupons_min: Maximum coupons per order must be 1 or more.
offers.error_b1g1_home_items_min: Max products in B1G1 home section must be 1 or more, or leave empty for all.
